---
output:
  html_document:
    fig_width: 1
    css: styles.css
---

----

:::: {style="display: flex;"}

::: {}

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/profile_pic.jpg" width="1900px">

:::

::: {.col data-latex="{0.05\textwidth}"}
\ 
<!-- an empty Div (with a white space), serving as
a column separator -->
:::

::: {}

Moin moin!

My name is Vinh Hung Le, currently a master student of Quantitative Economics in the University of Kiel.


:::

::::
